title: viola grandiflora subsp. lutea
intro: Viola grandiflora subsp. lutea, also known as the yellow violet or yellow pansy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Viola. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Viola grandiflora subsp. lutea include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as sore throats, digestive issues, and skin problems.
